query:
SELECT j.id as jobId, j.title, j.status, j.userId,
  COUNT(s.id) as totalScenes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s.status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s.status = 'generating' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as generating,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s.status = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s.status = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failed
FROM musicVideoJobs j
JOIN musicVideoScenes s ON s.jobId = j.id
WHERE j.status = 'rendering'
GROUP BY j.id, j.title, j.status, j.userId
ORDER BY j.id DESC
LIMIT 10;

  SUM(CASE WHEN s.status = 'generating' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as generating,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s.status = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s.status = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failed
